landing.headline: Who does
landing.subheadline: Create a task list, share the link via WhatsApp and let everyone choose what they do. Simple, fast and transparent.
landing.step1Desc: Give your group a name and add the tasks that need to be distributed.
landing.step2Desc: Describe each task and optionally set a maximum number of participants.
landing.step3Desc: Send the link via WhatsApp. Everyone clicks, grabs a task — done!
landing.feat1Desc: Participants can claim tasks with just a name. No registration required.
landing.feat2Desc: Share the link directly from the app via WhatsApp. One tap and everyone is in.
landing.feat3Desc: See at a glance who has grabbed which task. No double assignments.
landing.feat4Desc: Choose who can view the scorecard — just you, or everyone.
landing.ctaBlockDesc: Create your first group in less than a minute. No account needed.
landing.installHint: Add wieDoetHet to your home screen for quick access!

auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.installStepTitle: Add the app to your home screen
auth.installStepSubtitle: Always within reach — one tap and you're in
auth.installStepBenefit1: Open the app directly from your home screen, no browser needed
auth.installStepBenefit2: Works fast and feels like a native app
auth.installStepBenefit3: Receive notifications when someone grabs a task
auth.installDesktopDesc: On mobile you can add the app to your home screen via the browser menu.
auth.iosInstallIntro: Follow these two steps in Safari to add the app to your home screen:
auth.iosInstallStep1: Tap the share icon in the Safari toolbar at the bottom
auth.iosInstallStep2: Scroll down and tap 'Add to Home Screen'

anon.title: What's your name?
anon.description: Enter your name so others know who grabbed which task.

landing.title: Wie Doet Het – Task assignment for groups
landing.description: Assign tasks to your group via WhatsApp. Create a task list, share the link and see who picks what. Free, no account needed for participants.

login.title: Log in – Wie Doet Het
login.description: Log in to your Wie Doet Het account to manage your groups and tasks.

register.title: Create account – Wie Doet Het
register.description: Create a free account and start assigning tasks to your group.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do I assign tasks to a group?
faq.a1: Create a group on Wie Doet Het, add your tasks and share the link via WhatsApp. Participants click on the task they want to do. You can instantly see who picked what.
faq.a2: Wie Doet Het is a free app that lets you easily divide tasks among a group. Ideal for sports, school, parties and volunteering. Participants don't need an account.
faq.a3: Yes, Wie Doet Het is completely free to use. Create an account as an organiser and invite participants via a share link — they don't need to sign up anywhere.
faq.q4: Can I divide tasks via WhatsApp?
faq.a4: After creating a task list you generate a share link that you paste directly into your WhatsApp group. Participants open the link and claim their task without an extra app or account.

scorecard.title: Scorecard
scorecard.notVisible: The scorecard is not visible to you. The initiator has restricted access.

profile.title: My profile
profile.phoneHint: Enter your number in E.164 format, e.g. +31612345678. This number will be used for reminders.
profile.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid number in E.164 format (e.g. +31612345678)
profile.whatsappNotice: WhatsApp verification will be added soon. Save your number now so you automatically receive reminders once this is available.
